title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
